THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGALLET, JEANETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 521 LINDEN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,275.00 RENT, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,775.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WILL NOT EXECUTE ON WRIT FOR POSSESSION IF DFT PAYS SUM OF $3775 (BACK RENT, DMGS & ATNYS FEES) ACCORDING TO STIP: $1000 IMMEDIATELY AND BAL ON INSTALL PMTS. IF DEFT DEFAULTS OR BREACHES ANY COND OF STIP, PLTF MAY SEEK EX- PARTE AMD JDGMNT FOR ACTUAL ATNYS FEES/COSTS; SEE JUDGMENT.
